overall.description: A first-person exploration tour through an ancient Greek/Minoan leader's house in a video game, transitioning from interior frescoed rooms to a central courtyard with a pool, then exiting to a sunlit plaza overlooking a historic city with domed architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior hallway and rooms of ancient house

agents.ego_description: walking through interior corridors and rooms, observing wall decorations and furnishings

entered.detail: red figured paintings on black background depicting ancient scenes on stone walls
fluted stone columns with red painted bases supporting the structure
decorative woven rugs with geometric patterns covering the floor
wooden shelving units holding pottery and storage vessels
clay amphorae and storage jars arranged on shelves

segments.scene_description: Exploring the interior of the ancient house, walking past stone columns and walls adorned with red Minoan-style frescoes, across patterned rugs, with wooden shelves holding pottery visible in the side rooms.

scene_state.functional_zone: central courtyard with reflecting pool and tall tree

events.description: exits interior rooms into open-air courtyard with rectangular pool
camera tilts upward to look at tall cypress tree against blue sky

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard and looking up at the architecture and tree

entered.detail: rectangular water feature with lily pads floating on the surface
green lily pads and flowers floating in the courtyard pool
tall slender evergreen tree rising from the center of the courtyard
stone walls covered in dense green ivy and climbing plants

segments.scene_description: Entering the central courtyard featuring a rectangular pool with water lilies, surrounded by stone columns and ivy-covered walls. The camera approaches a tall cypress tree and tilts upward to view it against the bright blue sky between the building wings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway and archway leading to exterior

events.description: bright sun flare appears as camera turns toward the exit archway

agents.ego_description: walking toward the main exit while observing architectural details

entered.detail: tall blue fabric banners with white owl symbols hanging between columns
wooden lattice roof structure providing partial shade over the walkway
stone sculptures flanking the entrance pathway

segments.scene_description: Moving through the courtyard toward the main exit, passing under architectural details and decorative elements. A bright sun flare appears as the camera approaches the archway leading outside, with blue banners and stone statues becoming visible.

events.description: exits the house into open plaza with panoramic view of distant domed cityscape
game character runs across the plaza in front of the viewpoint

agents.ego_description: exiting the building and walking around the exterior plaza to survey the surroundings

notable_agents.action: character in ancient Greek attire runs across the plaza toward the city

entered.detail: distant view of ancient city with large domed buildings and temples
large bronze fire bowls with flames flanking the entrance stairs
open paved area with decorative tile patterns leading to the city

segments.scene_description: Exiting the house into a sunlit plaza with panoramic views of a distant ancient city featuring domed architecture and temples. Other characters are visible walking in the plaza, and the camera tours around the entrance area showing blue banners and decorative stonework before returning toward the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, frescoed interiors of an ancient house out into a vast, sunlit urban plaza. It begins by gliding past stone columns and red Minoan-style frescoes across patterned rugs, passing wooden shelves of pottery in adjacent rooms. As the camera moves forward, the interior opens into a central courtyard featuring a rectangular pool with water lilies and ivy-covered walls, before tilting upward to view a tall cypress tree against a bright blue sky. The scene then shifts toward the main exit, passing under decorative architectural elements as a bright sun flare emerges from the archway. Finally, the camera exits the house into a wide plaza where blue banners and stone statues frame a panoramic view of a distant ancient city filled with domed architecture and temples.
